results.title: Yapper Review: Frustrating to use | AppSumo
results.content:
AppSumo - 16 years of software deals
AppSumo - 16 years of software deals

### Yapper

freebie8

Verified purchaser

1 stars
1 stars

Frustrating to use

Been using and testing the platform for a few days so far, haven’t found any competitive advantages over generic platforms like veo 3.

Worst of all, there’s no proper knowledge base or complete step by step onboarding for features like deepfake or lip sync or even how to get the most out of these features (or just to get started)

Sure there’s an “articles” section, but as an AI video company, you don’t have YouTube video tutorials, how-to-use guide whether in text format or video, any social media presence, a community support area for questions…very frustrating for a new user [...] ## 3.5

3.53 stars
3.53 stars

#### Taco ratings

AppSumo

Part of the Sumo family  
with TidyCal, BreezeDoc, FormRobin,  and SendFox. [...] One of the biggest value adds of Yapper is that we offer support for models in one platform, which generic platforms like Google’s Veo-3 platforms don't. To get access to tools combined in Yapper, users would need to maintain a dozen platform subscription, all of which are routinely releasing new models that outrank others. One subscription to Yapper essentially guarantees that our users have access to the top models at any given time! We also focus on providing useful real-world templates for viral content and UGC ads. We spend a lot of time finding which formats are actually possible to recreate (& successfully post) with AI so you don't have to.

results.title: Big Yaps, Big Rewards: Announcing the dYdX Yapper Leaderboard
results.content:
This is dYdX’s first major SocialFi activation, a program designed to reward culture carriers, surface emerging voices, and amplify the stories that move the ecosystem forward.

→ View the live leaderboard

## What is the Yapper Leaderboard?

The Yapper Leaderboard is a real-time scoreboard that highlights which accounts are contributing the most Mindshare to the dYdX ecosystem.

Mindshare measures the share of voice an individual account brings to a project. It’s not about shouting the loudest or tweeting the most, it’s about the quality of the content, the focus of the commentary, and the authenticity of the engagement.

Using Kaito’s intelligence engine, the leaderboard rewards: [...] .svg)

## Fee Free for $BTC and $SOL

Get Started

## Surge: Up to $1M in Loss Rebates

Get Started

dYdX
Blog

## Big Yaps, Big Rewards: Announcing the dYdX Yapper Leaderboard

The dYdX Foundation is excited to announce the launch of the dYdX Yapper Leaderboard, a new initiative in collaboration with Kaito under the dYdX Ecosystem Development Program that recognizes and rewards the most meaningful voices shaping the conversations about dYdX on Crypto Twitter.

Launching on May 12, the leaderboard tracks and ranks individual accounts based on the originality, relevance, and impact of their tweets about dYdX. The top 100 contributors each month will share a $50,000 prize pool, turning Twitter into a true arena of insights, creativity, and onchain influence. [...] ## Leaving site

results.content:
Yo, if you’re like me, a regular Kaito Yapper try make waves, you’ve probably seen the Project Yapper Leaderboards and wondered: “Am I getting points for this?” Here’s the simple breakdown: What it tracks: The Project Yapper Leaderboard shows which individual X (Twitter) accounts are helping push the mindshare (aka YAPS literally) for a specific project. So if you’re tweeting about one project a lot and getting engagement, you might show up there. But I found out if i just talk about cyrpo and NFTS, in general, I get em toooooo. -- Do you get Yap points for this and thisss??? Nah. That leaderboard and your Yap points are two different things. Yap points come from all your crypto tweets (not just about one project). The Project Leaderboard just shows who’s talking the most (or best) about [...] user avatar

results.title: Instagram
results.content:
Day 8 of finding the best AI tools 🚀  
  
LLMs are only as good as the data they can access.  
  
Most models are trained on static datasets, but many AI apps need live web context—latest posts, trends, company updates, and real-time information.  
  
That's where Context.dev comes in.  
  
They're building web data APIs that let AI agents retrieve fresh, structured information from across the web instead of relying only on training data.  
  
One of the coolest demos they've shipped is the Yapper Leaderboard—a live ranking of YC companies and founders based on their X impressions and engagement.  
  
It's a fun showcase of what's possible when AI has access to real-time web data.  
  
💬 Comment CONTEXT and I'll send you the Yapper Leaderboard.

results.title: Yap FAQs | FAQ
results.content:
You have the option to input your wallet address(es) as part of the Yaps platform. Wallet lists may be used by Kaito or shared with other partners (In the form of a list of addresses - anonymized - not including associated X handles) - solely for the purpose of their own reward distribution to these wallet(s).
 Examples include:

  + Project X asks us for a list of wallets for their own (ie Project X) 1000 top Yappers on their Yapper Leaderboard
  + Project Y asks us for a list of wallets for their own (ie Project Y) voters on the Yapper Launchpad
 If you would no longer like your wallet(s) to be used by Kaito / to be shared with other partners for potential reward distribution, you can remove your wallet(s) at any time. You may also change your inputted wallet(s) at any time.
